trafficViolations.title: Traffic Violations
trafficViolations.subtitle: Record fines linked to bookings and fleet vehicles.
trafficViolations.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, booking, or plate…
trafficViolations.emptyDescription: Create a record when a renter receives a traffic fine during a contract.
trafficViolations.formSubtitle: Fields match the backend create/update commands.
trafficViolations.referenceLoadFailed: Could not load bookings or vehicles.
trafficViolations.invalidBookingVehicle: Choose a valid booking and vehicle.
trafficViolations.vehiclePlaceholder: Select a vehicle from the fleet list
trafficViolations.vehicleHint: Booking is optional. Pick a vehicle from the list, or select a booking to set the vehicle from the contract.
trafficViolations.vehicleLoadFailed: Could not load vehicle for this booking.
trafficViolations.noVehicleOnBooking: This booking has no linked vehicle id.
trafficViolations.formPageSubtitle: Record a traffic violation and link it to a vehicle, optionally to a rental booking.
trafficViolations.sectionIdentitySubtitl: Violation name and official number as on the ticket.
trafficViolations.sectionLinkingSubtitle: Link the violation to a fleet vehicle, optionally to a rental booking.
trafficViolations.sectionDetailsSubtitle: Violation date and time, fine amount, and optional notes.
trafficViolations.hintViolationName: Optional: short label for the violation type (e.g. speed, red light).
trafficViolations.hintViolationNumber: Official violation number — must be 1 or greater.
trafficViolations.hintBooking: Optional: pick a booking to auto-set the vehicle from the contract.
trafficViolations.hintViolationFine: Fine amount in SAR — zero or greater.
trafficViolations.hintViolationDescripti: Optional: internal notes or extra details.
trafficViolations.exampleViolationDescri: Example: Violation on King Fahd Road.
trafficViolations.linkingGuidance: Vehicle is required. Booking is optional — selecting a booking sets the vehicle from the contract when available.
